title: notifications-mail — HTTP routes
description: Tenant admin suppression list only. Provider webhooks (Mailgun / SendGrid / SES / Postmark / Resend) are received by the universal `webhook` module at `POST /webhooks/inbound/notifications-mail/{provider}`; this module subscribes to `webhook::InboundWebhookReceived` events filtered by namespace to ingest the provider payloads.

groups.name: tenant-suppressions
groups.description: Admin surface for viewing + managing the suppression list.

routes.description: Revoke a suppression (soft-delete). Refused for is_system=true entries.

provider_webhooks.reason: Universal inbound receiver + signature verification + audit trail owned by webhook module. This module subscribes to webhook::InboundWebhookReceived events filtered by namespace=notifications-mail + normalises the provider-specific payload into MailDelivered/Opened/Clicked/Bounced/Complaint events. Provider signature secrets configured in notifications-mail.webhook_secrets.{provider}.
